nasb.text: The city shall have open spaces: on the north 250 cubits, on the south 250 cubits, on the east 250 cubits, and on the west 250 cubits.

esv.text: And the city shall have open land: on the north 250 cubits, on the south 250, on the east 250, and on the west 250.

cnv.text: 城要有郊野， 北邊一百二十五公尺，南邊一 百二十五公尺，東邊一百二十五公尺，西邊一百二十五公尺。

ccb.text: 城四周要有草场，东西南北各长一百二十五米，
